## 🔍 Query Set 1: GERD-Related Diagnoses (Condition Resource)

### 1A — ICD-10-CM Codes (GERD, esophagitis, heartburn)
```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|K21.0,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|K21.9,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|R12,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|K30&_include=Condition:patient&_count=1000
```

| Code | Description | Clinical Note |
|------|-------------|---------------|
| `K21.0` | GERD **with** esophagitis | Endoscopically confirmed reflux esophagitis |
| `K21.9` | GERD **without** esophagitis | Most common ambulatory GERD code |
| `R12` | Heartburn | Symptom-level coding; often used before formal diagnosis |
| `K30` | Functional dyspepsia | Frequently empirically treated with PPIs; important for overcount analysis |

```

```

| `40790` | Pantoprazole | ✅ | ✅ (Protonix generic) |
| `17128` | Lansoprazole | ✅ | ✅ (Prevacid 24HR) |
| `75564` | Rabeprazole | ✅ | ❌ Rx only |
| `596723` | Dexlansoprazole | ✅ | ❌ Rx only (Dexilant) |
| `283742` | Esomeprazole | ✅ | ✅ (Nexium 24HR) |

---

### 2B — MedicationStatement: Recorded PPI Use (includes patient-reported, imported meds)
```
MedicationStatement?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|7646,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|40790,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|17128,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|75564,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|596723,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|283742&status=active&_include=MedicationStatement:patient&_count=1000
```

> ⚠️ **MedicationStatement captures OTC self-reported use** that never generates a `MedicationRequest`. For a deprescribing initiative, this is critical — omeprazole and lansoprazole OTC users are invisible to prescription-only queries.

## Population Logic Summary

```
FINAL POPULATION =
  (Condition: ICD-10 GERD/K21.0/K21.9/R12/K30)
  ∪ (Condition: SNOMED GERD codes)
  ∪ (MedicationRequest: active PPI orders)
  ∪ (MedicationStatement: active PPI recorded use)

De-duplicate by Patient.id across all result bundles.
```

## ⚠️ Known Gaps & Caveats

| Gap | Explanation | Mitigation |
|-----|-------------|------------|
| **OTC PPI use not documented** | Patients buying omeprazole OTC without telling provider | MedicationStatement + patient questionnaire |
| **Coded as H2 blocker first** | Some patients coded under famotidine before PPI switch | Separate H2RA query if needed |
| **RxNorm ingredient vs. product codes** | Some EHRs store clinical drug product codes (e.g., `402014` = omeprazole 20mg DR capsule), not ingredient-level | If yield is low, supplement with `code:text=omeprazole` text search |
| **PPI prescribed for non-GERD indications** | H. pylori triple therapy, NSAID gastroprotection, stress ulcer prophylaxis, Zollinger-Ellison | Cross-reference `MedicationRequest.reasonCode` or `reasonReference` for indication stratification |
| **Discontinued but not updated** | `MedicationRequest.status=active` may lag clinical reality if not reconciled | Consider also querying `status=completed` with `authoredOn` within last 12 months |

```
PPI patients (Query 1 subject IDs) − GERD patients (Query 2 subject IDs)
```

### Annotation Table

| Query | Parameter Detail | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `1a` `code=` | Searches `medicationCodeableConcept` token | Primary path on US Core / USCDI servers |
| `1b` `medication.code=` | Chained through `medicationReference → Medication.code` | Required when medication is a separate resource |
| `1c` Standalone `Medication` | Returns resource IDs for `_id=` follow-up on `MedicationRequest` | Fallback for servers that don't support chaining |
| `status=active,completed,on-hold,stopped` | Excludes `cancelled`, `entered-in-error`, `draft` | Preserves historical fills (completed) for pattern analysis |
| SNOMED `235595009` | GERD without esophagitis | Core reflux dx |
| SNOMED `698065002` | GERD with esophagitis | Erosive variant |
| SNOMED `16331000` | Esophagitis (any cause) | Broadens exclusion net |
| No `clinicalStatus` filter on Condition | Catches resolved/inactive historical dx | Ensures prior reflux coding triggers exclusion |

```
PPI_cohort     = subjects from Step 1a ∪ Step 1b
```
